synopsis: The *Millennium Falcon* is captured by an Imperial battlecruiser near Monastery, but Leia stages a distraction that lets the ship break free. In the confusion Baron Orman Tagge escapes his life-support capsule and stows away aboard the *Falcon*. On Monastery, Luke prepares to address the elders in the Temple of the Sacred Circle, only for Domina Tagge to reveal that they have already decided against him. When Luke objects, Vader seizes the moment to challenge him to a lightsaber duel, but Domina forbids combat in the temple and instead arranges the fight for the treacherous Crystal Valley. She has orchestrated the duel from the start, manipulating both Luke and Vader in the hope that they will destroy each other and rid her family of two rivals at once.
title: Star Wars (1977) #36: Red Queen Rising
